overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a sunlit flooded village. The character walks through shallow water past wooden and stone buildings along a lakeshore during golden hour, eventually entering a stone structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded village path alongside wooden house

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water along a path bordered by dense trees on the left and a large orange wooden building on the right

entered.detail: two-story orange plaster building with wooden beams and ivy covering the walls
dense green deciduous trees lining the flooded path
large wooden water wheel attached to the side of the building
shallow water covering the ground with visible stone paving beneath

segments.scene_description: Walking along a flooded path surrounded by dense greenery, approaching a large orange wooden building partially covered in vines. The water wheel becomes visible on the building's side as the character moves forward.

events.description: rounding the corner of the wooden building to reveal open lake water and a beached sailboat

agents.ego_description: turning right around the building corner to follow the shoreline toward the open water

entered.detail: large wooden sailboat with tan canvas sail beached in shallow water
expansive calm lake with mountain reflections
hazy blue mountain range visible across the lake

segments.scene_description: Rounding the corner of the wooden building, the view opens to a wide sunlit lake with a beached sailboat and mountains in the distance. The water wheel remains visible on the right as the character turns toward the waterfront.

events.description: character wades through slightly deeper water near the sailboat

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water along the shore, passing the large sailboat while heading toward a distant stone building

entered.detail: large multi-story stone building with ivy-covered walls and towers
wooden pier structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sunlit waterfront with the sailboat now on the right, heading toward a large ivy-covered stone manor house visible in the distance across the flooded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded courtyard before stone manor entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the flooded courtyard toward the entrance of the stone building, passing beached rowboats

entered.detail: weathered wooden steps leading up to the building entrance
arched stone doorway entrance to the manor

segments.scene_description: Approaching the ivy-covered stone manor through the flooded courtyard, with wooden stairs and the entrance archway becoming prominent in the foreground.

events.description: entering the dark interior of the stone building from the bright exterior

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and entering the dark doorway of the stone building

entered.detail: dark wooden door frame leading into the building interior
rough-hewn stone walls inside the building with wooden support beams

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wooden stairs and stepping through the doorway into the dimly lit stone interior, transitioning from the bright golden hour exterior to the shadowy inside of the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit flooded village that transitions from lush greenery into the shadowy interior of a stone manor. It begins by following a path through dense foliage toward a large orange wooden building, where a water wheel gradually comes into view. As the camera rounds the corner of the structure, the view opens onto a wide, sunlit lake featuring a beached sailboat and distant mountains. The scene then shifts along the waterfront toward a large ivy-covered stone manor house, moving through a flooded courtyard until the wooden stairs and entrance archway dominate the foreground. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs and steps through the doorway, shifting abruptly from the bright golden hour light of the exterior into a dimly lit stone interior.
